sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The board changed after pressing SPACE. Let me check what changed by comparing the before and after frames.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after SPACE press
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}

print("Before nodes:")
for nid, n in sorted(before_nodes.items()):
    if n['pixels'] <= 70:
        print(f"  id={nid} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash']}")

print("\nAfter nodes:")
for nid, n in sorted(after_nodes.items()):
    if n['pixels'] <= 70:
        print(f"  id={nid} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash']}")

# Check for differences
print("\nDifferences:")
for nid in after_nodes:
    if nid in before_nodes:
        bn = before_nodes[nid]
        an = after_nodes[nid]
        if bn['hash'] != an['hash'] or bn['pixels'] != an['pixels']:
            print(f"  Node {nid}: pixels {bn['pixels']}->{an['pixels']}, hash {bn['hash']}->{an['hash']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
